message:
ci: add benchmark workflow with Criterion

- Run benchmarks on push/PR to main
- Upload benchmark results as artifacts
- Add PR comparison job to show results in summary

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,66 @@
+name: Benchmarks
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [main]
+  workflow_dispatch:
+
+env:
+  CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
+
+jobs:
+  benchmark:
+    name: Run Benchmarks
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 30
+
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install Rust toolchain
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
+
+      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+
+      - name: Run Criterion benchmarks
+        run: cargo bench --bench '*' -- --noplot 2>&1 | tee bench-output.log
+        continue-on-error: true
+
+      - name: Upload benchmark results
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: benchmark-results
+          path: |
+            bench-output.log
+            target/criterion/
+          retention-days: 14
+
+  # Optional: Compare benchmarks against baseline
+  compare:
+    name: Compare Benchmarks
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
+    needs: benchmark
+
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Download benchmark results
+        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: benchmark-results
+          path: current-bench
+
+      - name: Parse benchmark results
+        run: |
+          echo "## Benchmark Results" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          if [ -f current-bench/bench-output.log ]; then
+            echo '```' >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+            grep -E "(time:|thrpt:)" current-bench/bench-output.log | head -50 >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY || echo "No timing results found" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+            echo '```' >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          else
+            echo "No benchmark output found" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          fi
